ctxMarket: Attention this week centered on ETF flow trends for major assets, including Solana. Technical indicators for SOL have drawn interest, while infrastructure updates are spotlighting new user tools.
ctxTalking:
• ETF weekly flows and how Solana compared to Bitcoin, Ethereum, and XRP
• Solana’s MACD indicator flashing a bullish signal, with resistance noted at $90
• New tools like Tokens.xyz and collaborations enabling fiat-to-stablecoin payroll on Solana
ctxMatters: ETF flows can influence institutional sentiment toward Solana. Technical signals are shaping short-term expectations for SOL price action. Expanded onchain tools and fiat integration may drive broader adoption and utility for Solana users and developers.
ctxSignal:
Signal: ETF trends and new infrastructure for asset discovery and payroll settlement on Solana.
Noise: Speculation around short-term price moves based on single technical indicators.
ctxGlossary:
MACD — A technical indicator used to spot momentum shifts in asset prices
ETF — Exchange-traded fund, a vehicle for gaining exposure to assets like SOL via traditional markets

readMore.title: ETFs weekly recap – How did Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana and XRP do this week?
Solana confirms a bullish signal, which last sparked 100% SOL price gains
